modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Cannot open Banner in Internet Explorer.

full_description_text:  
I am trying to open Banner. It just won't come up. I use Internet Explorer. I don't know why it is not working.
short_description: Cannot open Banner in Internet Explorer.
description: I am trying to open Banner. It just won't come up. I use Internet Explorer. I don't know why it is not working.
